recommendations.title: Ordinary Decent Criminal
recommendations.overview: Michael Lynch is a notorious criminal with two wives and a flair for showmanship. He's also a huge embarrassment to the local police, who are determined to bring him down once and for all.

recommendations.title: Tarzan the Ape Man

recommendations.title: The Dead Pool

recommendations.title: Congo
recommendations.overview: Eight people embark on an expedition into the Congo, a mysterious expanse of unexplored Africa, where human greed and the laws of nature have gone berserk.

recommendations.title: The Dinosaur Project
recommendations.overview: Found footage of an expedition into the Congo jungle where a team of explorers stumbles upon a colony of Dinosaurs.

recommendations.title: The Miracle Club
recommendations.overview: Three close friends who have never left the outskirts of Dublin (much less Ireland) get the journey of a lifetime — a visit to Lourdes, the picturesque French town and place of miracles.

recommendations.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

recommendations.title: Forbidden Planet
